---
title: "Tips"
subtitle: "というよりも備忘録。"
listing:
  - id: latest-list
    contents: "**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 3
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: r-list
    contents: sections/r.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 9
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: python-list
    contents: sections/python.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 9
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: docs-list
    contents: sections/docs.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 9
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: env-list
    contents: sections/env.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 9
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: gis-list
    contents: sections/gis.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 9
    categories: true
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    image-placeholder: thumbnail/thumbnail.jpg
  - id: all-list
    contents: "**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: table
    feed: true
code-tools: false
comments: false
title-block-banner: true
language: 
  ja:
    toc-title-website: "セクション"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.quarto-title-banner .quarto-title .title {
    font-family: "Libre Baskerville";
}

.spacer {
  margin-top: 2em;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}

.spacer-lg {
  margin-top: 4em;
  margin-bottom: 4em;
}

section.section-heading {
  margin-top: 2.5em;
}

h2.section-heading {
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
}

/* Hide pagination while section is collapsed */
.section-listing-collapsed .listing-pagination {
  display: none;
}

/* Latest Posts: pagination is not needed (preview only) */
#listing-latest-list .listing-pagination {
  display: none;
}

/* Collapsed section: hide items beyond the 3rd */
.section-listing-collapsed .list.grid .g-col-1:nth-child(n+4) {
  display: none;
}

/* Show more button */
.show-more-btn {
  display: block;
  margin: 1.5em auto 0;
  padding: 0.35rem 1.6rem;
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.show-more-btn:hover {
  background-color: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
  color: var(--bs-body-color);
}

#listing-all-list,
#listing-all-list-sort {
  display: none;
}
```

```{r}
#| include: false
today <- Sys.Date()
date <- sprintf(
  "%d年%d月%d日",
  as.integer(format(today, "%Y")),
  as.integer(format(today, "%m")),
  as.integer(format(today, "%d"))
)

vscode_ver <- system("code --version", intern = TRUE)[1]

ubuntu_ver <- system("lsb_release -ds", intern = TRUE)[1]

python_ver <- system("uv run python --version", intern = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
source(here::here("pages/tips/carousel.R"))
carousel(
  "tips-carousel",
  5000,
  yaml.load_file(here::here("pages/tips/carousel.yml"))
)
```

<div class="spacer"></div>

## {{< fa clock-rotate-left >}} 最新記事 {.section-heading}

::: {#latest-list}
:::

## {{< fa brands r-project >}} R {.section-heading}

::: {#r-list}
:::

## {{< fa brands python >}} Python {.section-heading}

::: {#python-list}
:::

## {{< fa pen-to-square >}} 執筆・ドキュメント {.section-heading}

::: {#docs-list}
:::

## {{< fa laptop-code >}} 開発環境 {.section-heading}

::: {#env-list}
:::

## {{< fa map >}} データ・GIS {.section-heading}

::: {#gis-list}
:::

::: {#all-list}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var sectionIds = [
    'listing-r-list',
    'listing-python-list',
    'listing-docs-list',
    'listing-env-list',
    'listing-gis-list'
  ];

  function waitForListings(cb) {
    var t = setInterval(function () {
      var ls = window['quarto-listings'];
      if (ls && sectionIds.every(function (id) { return ls[id]; })) {
        clearInterval(t);
        cb(ls);
      }
    }, 50);
  }

  waitForListings(function (ls) {

    /* ── Section collapse / show-more ── */
    sectionIds.forEach(function (id) {
      var container = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!container) return;

      var total = ls[id].items.length;
      if (total <= 3) return;

      container.classList.add('section-listing-collapsed');

      var btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.className = 'show-more-btn';

      function update(collapsed) {
        if (collapsed) {
          container.classList.add('section-listing-collapsed');
          btn.textContent = 'もっと見る（' + (total - 3) + '件）';
        } else {
          container.classList.remove('section-listing-collapsed');
          btn.textContent = '折りたたむ';
        }
      }

      update(true);
      btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        update(!container.classList.contains('section-listing-collapsed'));
      });
      container.appendChild(btn);
    });

  });
});
</script>
```

<div class="spacer-lg"></div>

::: {.callout-note}
## 開発環境
最終更新日：`r date`

- OS: `r ubuntu_ver`
- VSCode `r vscode_ver`
- `r R.version.string`
- `r python_ver`
- Quarto {{< version >}}
:::
